name: Chester Bennington
title: Last known photo of Chester Bennington, taken by his wife Talinda at Terranea Resort in Rancho Palos Verdes roughly 36 hours before his death — shared publicly two months later to raise awareness about depression.
description: The last known photo of Chester Bennington was taken by his wife Talinda Bennington during a family outing at Nelson's, the bluff-side restaurant at Terranea Resort in Rancho Palos Verdes, California — roughly 36 hours before he took his own life on July 20, 2017. Talinda shared the image publicly on September 6, 2017, writing: “This is what depression looked like to us just 36 hrs b4 his death.” She has since become a vocal advocate for mental health awareness through her 320 Changes Direction initiative. He was 41 years old.

lyrics.text:
I can't feel the way I did before
Don't turn your back on me, I won't be ignored
Time won't heal this damage anymore
Don't turn your back on me, I won't be ignored

bio: Chester Bennington was an American singer best known as the lead vocalist of Linkin Park, one of the bestselling rock bands of the 2000s. His vocal range — spanning a piercing scream to clean melodic singing — defined albums including Hybrid Theory (2000) and Meteora (2003). He also fronted Dead by Sunrise and served as lead vocalist of Stone Temple Pilots from 2013 to 2015.

location.name: Nelson's, Terranea Resort, 100 Terranea Way, Rancho Palos Verdes, CA 90275
